name: io.github.suryast/indonesia-civic-stack
description: 40 MCP tools for 11 Indonesian government portals — BPOM, BPJPH, AHU, OJK, BMKG+

environmentVariables.description: Proxy URL for accessing Indonesian government portals from outside Indonesia (e.g. Cloudflare Worker URL)
environmentVariables.name: PROXY_URL

environmentVariables.description: BPS Statistics API key (free registration at webapi.bps.go.id)
environmentVariables.name: BPS_API_KEY
